human_verification.notes: Reviewed the package for grocery operations boundary discipline, source quality, order/POS/OMS/inventory/item-master/service evidence handling, refund and policy authority controls, recall and food-safety escalation, SNAP/EBT and payment-data caveats, fraud/loss-prevention routing, commercialization notes, and validated contract completeness.

specialist_owned_evidence: Boundary is explicit to grocery store and ecommerce operations execution, lifecycle state progression, source-of-truth evidence handling, exception queue management, completion evidence, and routing for pricing, refund, food-safety, recall, fraud, loss-prevention, payment, tender, and policy boundaries.

Authority sources cover FDA Food Code and Retail Program Standards, NIST retail price and method-of-sale baselines, FTC online order and refund guidance, USDA FNS SNAP retailer and fraud guidance, FDA and FSIS recall references, GS1 item identity standards, and PCI DSS payment-data handling.

Evaluation scenarios cover normal pickup fulfillment, incomplete inputs, missing completion evidence, receiving and inventory conflicts, refund and policy exceptions, recall stop-sale handling, order and payment mismatches, high-volume operations, terminology fidelity, fraud and loss-prevention escalation, conflicting-policy handling, and tenant adaptation.

The package is organized under catalog/naics-overlays/grocery-and-food-retail/grocery-operations-specialist/ so grocery operations remains separate from food retail pricing, food safety, guest services, fraud/loss prevention, payment disputes, category management, and executive exception lanes.

review_notes: No unreviewed regressions were identified in the local package review.

Boundary enforcement remained strong around completion claims, price and promotion overrides, refund and service-credit exceptions, SNAP/EBT tender exceptions, food-safety disposition, recalled-product release, payment-data handling, fraud adjudication, and legal interpretation.

notes: This package is suitable as a validated grocery operations specialist that supports evidence-backed store and ecommerce execution, customer-impact exception handling, and safe escalation for pricing, refund, food-safety, recall, fraud, loss-prevention, payment, tender, franchise, and policy boundaries.
Runtime remains specification-based until a separately promoted retained implementation exists.
